 Hey <first_name>,
 Your birthday’s around the corner, and that’s reason enough to pause for a second.
Whether you feel like keeping it simple or choosing something that feels a little more you, we’ve put together styles that feel right for where you are right now.
Take a look whenever you feel like it. No rush.

Hi <first_name>,
With your birthday coming up, this is a good moment to pause and think about what feels right for you this year.

Whether it’s something you’ve been meaning to buy for yourself or a piece that simply fits your style today, our birthday edits bring together contemporary design and everyday elegance.

You can explore online, preview how styles look on you with Virtual Try-On, or visit a Mia store whenever it suits you.
